title: hesperis incana
intro: Hesperis incana, also known as the sweet rocket or silver rocket, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Hesperis incana can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions.
